The '''Hethas''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with long faces and large craniums. The gangster [[Gornt Seron]] was a member of this species.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=A Physical Application Of The Law|book=Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations}} {{1st}}
